news:news.news:title: US Treasury Secretary supports economic pain for long-term security against Iran, while Israel and Lebanon initiate direct talks for the first time in decades.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran economic sanctions, Israel Lebanon negotiations, Sudan conflict updates, migrant crisis in Indian Ocean, US political controversies

news:news.news:title: The IMF warns that escalating tensions in Iran could lead to a global recession, significantly impacting the UK economy.
news:news.news:keywords: global recession risks, United Airlines merger news, BP corporate restructuring, Pittsburgh Post-Gazette acquisition, Goldman Sachs AI concerns

news:news.news:title: Microsoft is discontinuing its Surface Hub touchscreen displays, while privacy advocates are urging Google to stop sharing consumer data with ICE.
news:news.news:keywords: Microsoft Surface Hub discontinuation, Google data privacy concerns, Amazon streaming service bundle, AI safety and violence, LG OLED TV sale

news:news.news:title: LaMelo Ball's clutch performance led the Hornets to victory over the Heat in a dramatic play-in game, while the Blazers secured the 7th seed in the playoffs.
news:news.news:keywords: NBA play-in game results, Giants contract negotiations, NHL coaching criticism, J. Cole basketball career, college football rankings update

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include a rare cosmic reaction, debunking myths about Hawaiian birds, and advancements in understanding metabolism and quantum systems.
news:news.news:keywords: breakthroughs in astrophysics, Hawaiian bird extinction myth, metabolism and weight gain, quantum memory systems, gum disease treatment innovations

news:news.news:title: Lebanon engages in peace talks with Israel amid limited influence, while global political tensions rise with Hungary's PM's comments on Russia and Italy's PM condemning Trump.
news:news.news:keywords: Lebanon-Israel peace talks, Hungary Russia relations, Italy Trump criticism, child HIV outbreak in hospital, Harry and Meghan Australia visit

news:news.news:title: Oil prices fell below $100 a barrel amid mixed signals from US-Iran negotiations and concerns over energy market stability.
news:news.news:keywords: oil price fluctuations, US-Iran negotiations impact, Goldman Sachs AI risk awareness, Texas investment strategies, small business success stories

news:news.news:title: Daniel Moreno-Gama faces federal charges for attacking OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, while Microsoft raises Surface device prices amid RAM shortages.
news:news.news:keywords: federal charges against tech CEO, electric vehicle market updates, Microsoft Surface price increase, NZXT class-action lawsuit settlement, Apple Watch Series 11 sales

news:news.news:title: The 2026 WNBA draft saw Azzi Fudd selected first overall, while UCLA set a record with five first-round picks.
news:news.news:keywords: WNBA draft highlights, UCLA basketball achievements, Dick Vitale health announcement, MLB player performances, NHL retirements

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries highlight advancements in health, environmental challenges, and new insights into human history and genetics.
news:news.news:keywords: health innovations, environmental science, human history discoveries, genetic research, wildlife conservation

news:news.news:title: Hamas Rejects Disarmament Talks as IMF Warns Iran Tensions Could Trigger Global Recession
